languages.text: {n}Сержант хмурится, но связывается по {g|Encyclopedia:Vox}воксу{/g} — и вскоре отдает передатчик вам. Ювенна обеспокоена вашей осведомленностью. Заставить ее довериться будет непросто.{/n}

traits.locale_text: {n}Сержант хмурится, но связывается по {g|Encyclopedia:Vox}воксу{/g} — и вскоре отдает передатчик вам. Ювенна обеспокоена вашей осведомленностью. Заставить ее довериться будет непросто.{/n}

languages.text: {n}The sergeant frowns, but picks up his {g|Encyclopedia:Vox}vox{/g} — and soon hands the transmitter to you. Your apparent knowledge has rattled Juvenna. Gaining her trust will be difficult.{/n}
languages.original_text: {n}Сержант хмурится, но связывается по {g|Encyclopedia:Vox}воксу{/g} — и вскоре отдает передатчик вам. Ювенна обеспокоена вашей осведомленностью. Заставить ее довериться будет непросто.{/n}

traits.locale_text: {n}The sergeant frowns, but picks up his {g|Encyclopedia:Vox}vox{/g} — and soon hands the transmitter to you. Your apparent knowledge has rattled Juvenna. Gaining her trust will be difficult.{/n}
{n}The sergeant frowns, but picks up his {g|Encyclopedia:Vox}vox{/g} — and soon hands the transmitter to you. Your apparent knowledge has rattled Juvenna. Gaining her trust will be difficult.{/n}
{n}The sergeant frowns, but picks up his {g|Encyclopedia:Vox}vox{/g} — and soon hands the transmitter to you. Your apparent knowledge has rattled Juvenna. Gaining her trust will be difficult.{/n}

languages.text: {n}军士皱了皱眉，但还是拿起了{g|Encyclopedia:Vox}音阵{/g}，随后很快便将传输器递给了你。你知道的太多了，这让尤文娜心里发虚。再想赢得她的信任可就难了。{/n}
languages.original_text: {n}The sergeant frowns, but picks up his {g|Encyclopedia:Vox}vox{/g} — and soon hands the transmitter to you. Your apparent knowledge has rattled Juvenna. Gaining her trust will be difficult.{/n}

traits.locale_text: {n}军士皱了皱眉，但还是拿起了{g|Encyclopedia:Vox}音阵{/g}，随后很快便将传输器递给了你。你知道的太多了，这让尤文娜心里发虚。再想赢得她的信任可就难了。{/n}

languages.text: {n}Le sergent fronce les sourcils, mais prend son {g|Encyclopedia:Vox}vox{/g} et vous le tend au bout de quelques instants. Les connaissances que vous semblez posséder ont ébranlé Juvenna. Il sera difficile de gagner sa confiance.{/n}
languages.original_text: {n}The sergeant frowns, but picks up his {g|Encyclopedia:Vox}vox{/g} — and soon hands the transmitter to you. Your apparent knowledge has rattled Juvenna. Gaining her trust will be difficult.{/n}

traits.locale_text: {n}Le sergent fronce les sourcils, mais prend son {g|Encyclopedia:Vox}vox{/g} et vous le tend au bout de quelques instants. Les connaissances que vous semblez posséder ont ébranlé Juvenna. Il sera difficile de gagner sa confiance.{/n}

languages.text: {n}Kaşlarını çatan çavuş, {g|Encyclopedia:Vox}voksunu{/g} alıyor ve kısa bir süre sonra vericiyi sana uzatıyor. Bir şeyler biliyor oluşun, Juvenna'yı sarsmış. Onun güvenini kazanmak zor olacak.{/n}
languages.original_text: {n}The sergeant frowns, but picks up his {g|Encyclopedia:Vox}vox{/g} — and soon hands the transmitter to you. Your apparent knowledge has rattled Juvenna. Gaining her trust will be difficult.{/n}

traits.locale_text: {n}Kaşlarını çatan çavuş, {g|Encyclopedia:Vox}voksunu{/g} alıyor ve kısa bir süre sonra vericiyi sana uzatıyor. Bir şeyler biliyor oluşun, Juvenna'yı sarsmış. Onun güvenini kazanmak zor olacak.{/n}

languages.text: {n}El sargento frunce el ceño, pero recoge su {g|Encyclopedia:Vox}voco{/g}... y pronto te entrega el transmisor. Tus conocimientos han inquietado a Juvenna. Te será difícil ganarte su confianza.{/n}
languages.original_text: {n}The sergeant frowns, but picks up his {g|Encyclopedia:Vox}vox{/g} — and soon hands the transmitter to you. Your apparent knowledge has rattled Juvenna. Gaining her trust will be difficult.{/n}

traits.locale_text: {n}El sargento frunce el ceño, pero recoge su {g|Encyclopedia:Vox}voco{/g}... y pronto te entrega el transmisor. Tus conocimientos han inquietado a Juvenna. Te será difícil ganarte su confianza.{/n}

languages.text: {n}Der Sergeant runzelt die Stirn, greift aber nach seinem {g|Encyclopedia:Vox}Vox{/g} — und überrecht dir wenig später den Transmitter. Dein offensichtliches Wissen hat Juvenna verunsichert. Es dürfte schwierig werden, ihr Vertrauen zu gewinnen.{/n}
languages.original_text: {n}The sergeant frowns, but picks up his {g|Encyclopedia:Vox}vox{/g} — and soon hands the transmitter to you. Your apparent knowledge has rattled Juvenna. Gaining her trust will be difficult.{/n}

traits.locale_text: {n}Der Sergeant runzelt die Stirn, greift aber nach seinem {g|Encyclopedia:Vox}Vox{/g} — und überrecht dir wenig später den Transmitter. Dein offensichtliches Wissen hat Juvenna verunsichert. Es dürfte schwierig werden, ihr Vertrauen zu gewinnen.{/n}

languages.text: {n}軍曹は眉をひそめたが、自分の{g|Encyclopedia:Vox}ヴォックス{/g}を取り上げ、すぐにあなたに送信機を渡した。あなたの知識はジュベナを驚かせた。彼女の信頼を得ることは難しいだろう。{/n}
languages.original_text: {n}The sergeant frowns, but picks up his {g|Encyclopedia:Vox}vox{/g} — and soon hands the transmitter to you. Your apparent knowledge has rattled Juvenna. Gaining her trust will be difficult.{/n}

traits.locale_text: {n}軍曹は眉をひそめたが、自分の{g|Encyclopedia:Vox}ヴォックス{/g}を取り上げ、すぐにあなたに送信機を渡した。あなたの知識はジュベナを驚かせた。彼女の信頼を得ることは難しいだろう。{/n}
